case_title: KENNEDY, OSCAR vs. WAGNER, PHILLIP et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT WAGNER, PHILLIP ROMERO, ALFONSO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-29-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-24-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-11-1999

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY JAMES M ROGERS HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE OO

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-03-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY JAMES M ROGERS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-18-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAR-03-1999 TO APR-14-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
